eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Chisago, MN; at 9:19 AM on JUN 5, 2026 Effective until 12:19 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
CHISAGO COUNTY TO SURROUNDING AREA

Be on the lookout for a suspicious male wearing all black clothing and cowboy boots and a dark colored hat. Officers are looking to make contact with him. Please be cautious and call Chisago County Sheriff's Office with any and all information at 651.257.4100
